message:
fix(api): add rate limiting to public-facing mutation endpoints

The appeals, DMCA, export, and roadmap POST/GET endpoints were
unprotected against abuse. A single IP could submit unlimited appeals,
DMCA requests, or feature requests, or hammer the export ZIP builder.

Each endpoint now uses createRateLimiter with per-IP sliding windows:
- Appeals: 5/hour (matches real-world appeal frequency)
- DMCA: 10/hour (allows batch filings while preventing spam)
- Export: 30/minute (ZIP generation is CPU-intensive)
- Roadmap: 5/hour (feature requests should be deliberate)

Tests mock the rate-limit module to keep them fast and deterministic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
